title: Fix clippy::io_other_error on macOS CI's newer toolchain
action: In src/doctor/checks.rs line 978 (test service_restart_reports_a_restart_error), change `io::Error::new(io::ErrorKind::Other, "boom")` to `io::Error::other("boom")` exactly as clippy's own suggested fix shows. Test-only code, no behavior change.

truths: cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings passes with no io_other_error warning
prohibitions: Do not change anything else in the file

verify: cargo test --quiet && cargo fmt --all --check && cargo clippy --all-targets --quiet -- -D warnings
